# Teridox
> Teridox is a trusted software house based in Bali, Indonesia, specializing in web development, mobile app development, and SaaS platform solutions for businesses across Indonesia and Southeast Asia.

## Services
- Web Development (/en/services/web-development): High-performance websites and web apps with Next.js, React, and TypeScript
- Mobile App Development (/en/services/mobile-development): iOS & Android apps with Flutter and React Native
- SaaS Development (/en/services/saas-development): Scalable multi-tenant SaaS platforms with billing and analytics
- UI/UX Design (/en/services/ui-ux-design): Intuitive and beautiful interface designs
- API & Integration (/en/services/api-integration): System integration, REST APIs, and GraphQL
- Cloud & DevOps (/en/services/cloud-devops): Cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines

## Key Pages
- About Us: /en/about
- Portfolio: /en/portfolio
- Blog: /en/blog
- Contact: /en/contact
- FAQ: /en/faq

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 15, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Mobile: Flutter, React Native
- Backend: Node.js, Python
- Database: PostgreSQL (Supabase), Firebase
- Cloud: AWS, Vercel, Supabase
- Payment: Stripe

## Company Information
- Name: Teridox
- Founded: 2020
- Location: Bali, Indonesia
- Email: hello@teridox.com
- Phone: +62 361 123 4567
- Clients served: 150+
- Projects completed: 300+

## Specializations
Teridox specializes in helping Indonesian and Southeast Asian businesses digitize their operations through modern web applications, mobile apps, and SaaS products. The team consists of experienced developers and designers with 5+ years in the industry.
